steps.title: Locate the surfactant finding
steps.content: The question asks what Chen and colleagues discovered about surfactants. The final sentence says surfactants are released from microplastics and have a much stronger wave-reducing effect than microplastic particles alone can explain.

steps.title: Remove unsupported effects
steps.content: Choice A invents using surfactants to contain microplastics. Choice B invents a water-based composition. Choice D invents a cleanup role. The remaining choice states the reported stronger effect on wave activity. The answer is C.
